'''Paxaz Izhiq''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] criminal who worked on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] with [[Vinna Jiss]], a [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|GAR]] logistics center [[Clerk/Legends|clerk]], during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. After becoming separated from Jiss during a meetup, he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in a firefight with [[Clone commando/Legends|Clone commandos]] in what was chalked up to a "gang rivalry." It was believed by [[Kal Skirata]] and [[Jaller Obrim]] that he was most likely a member of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}}
